The '''''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide''' is a 272-page paperback book designed to help the gamer through the ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' game. It was written by [[Michael Knight]] and published by [[Prima Games]] on [[February 14]], [[2006]]. It had many strategy ideas for the gamer and clues and hints for a good tactical war officer.
